caption: The video appears to be a segment from a political discussion show titled "Plus Politics" on Plus TV, focusing on a statement made by Bola Tinubu that "Nigeria Needs Me." The host, dressed in a suit and tie, is seated in a studio with a backdrop featuring a world map and the show's logo. On the right side of the screen, there is an inset image of Olusola Oyekanmi, identified as a political analyst from Lagos, who is participating in the discussion via phone. The host seems to be engaging with Oyekanmi, possibly discussing the implications of Tinubu's statement. The lower third of the screen displays the show's title, the topic being discussed, and prompts viewers to watch online or subscribe to their YouTube channel. The overall setting suggests a professional and informative discussion on current political affairs in Nigeria.
